name: Dr. Dabber Switch 2 Replacement Carb Cap
summary: Made from high-quality glass and featuring fully adjustable airflow, the Dr.
description: Made from high-quality glass and featuring fully adjustable airflow, the Dr. Dabber Switch 2 Replacement Carb Cap ensures a smooth and effortless experience with its magnetic silicone seal. The magnetic cap not only provides a secure, airtight fit but also keeps your Switch 2 cap firmly in place, giving you confidence and peace of mind while using it. *only compatible with Dr Dabber Switch 2 A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
